# Version 4.150.0
> **New filters and perf work** · Released July 7, 2026 · [NuGet](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/4.150.0) · [GitHub Release](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/releases/tag/v4.150.0)

> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](4.150.0/index.md) · [HarfBuzzSharp API diff](harfbuzzsharp/14.2.1/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.150.0 adds fast-bounds culling, three new image/color filters, and lands on Skia m150. SKPaint.GetFastBounds() gives cheap quick-reject bounds, SKImageFilter picks up Crop and Empty, and SKColorFilter gains an overdraw visualizer. A small-sigma raster blur regression is fixed and SKSurface.Canvas is now cached across calls to cut per-frame allocations.

## Breaking Changes

- **Remaining pre-v4 obsolete enum members removed** — Enum members and types that were `[Obsolete]` before v4 are removed from the reference assembly. If you get a `CS0117` or `CS0619` on an enum value that was previously deprecated, use the replacement documented on the type. ([#4195](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4195))
- **.NET Interactive (Polyglot Notebooks) support removed** — The `SkiaSharp.Extensions.DotNetInteractive` integration is removed; the underlying .NET Interactive extensibility surface it depended on is no longer maintained. Consumers rendering SkiaSharp images in notebooks should encode to a byte[] and use a generic image display cell instead. ([#4186](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4186))

## Engine

- **Skia updated to milestone m150** — The bundled engine moves to m150 and folds in a follow-up upstream chrome/m150 bug-fix sync. ([#4146](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4146), [#4190](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4190))

## API Surface

- **SKPaint.GetFastBounds() for quick-reject culling** — A cheap conservative bounds computation for a paint (stroke + effects) — use it to skip draws that fall outside the clip without building a full bounds pipeline. ([#4271](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4271))
- **New SKImageFilter and SKColorFilter factories** — `SKImageFilter.CreateCrop`, `SKImageFilter.CreateEmpty` and `SKColorFilter.CreateOverdraw` fill in commonly-needed filters (bounds cropping, no-op filter, overdraw visualization). ([#4227](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4227), [#4228](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4228), [#4229](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4229))

## Bug Fixes

- **Small-sigma raster blur regression fixed** — Defining `SK_AVOID_SLOW_RASTER_PIPELINE_BLURS` restores the fast blur path for very small sigmas that had regressed to the slow pipeline (visible as blurry-but-noisy output on tight shadows). — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#4269](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4269))

## Lifecycle & Internals

- **SKSurface.Canvas cached across calls** — The `Canvas` property no longer allocates a new wrapper on every access — the same managed wrapper is returned for a given surface, cutting per-frame allocations in draw loops. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#4247](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4247))

## Security

- **HarfBuzz updated to 14.2.1** — Picks up the upstream 14.2.1 bug-fix release. ([#4167](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4167))

## HarfBuzzSharp 14.2.1

Bumps the bundled HarfBuzz to 14.2.1; there are no HarfBuzzSharp binding changes beyond the version refresh.

## Community Contributors ❤️

Thank you to everyone who contributed to this release!

|-------------|---------------|

## Release Candidate 1 (June 29, 2026)

The release candidate added `SKPaint.GetFastBounds()`, the new SKImageFilter/SKColorFilter factories, the SKSurface Canvas cache, the small-sigma raster blur fix, and folded in an upstream chrome/m150 bug-fix sync.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.150.0-preview.2.1...v4.150.0-rc.1.1)

## Preview 2 (June 24, 2026)

Preview 2 removed .NET Interactive support, trimmed the last pre-v4 obsoletes from the reference assembly, and picked up harfbuzz 14.2.1.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.150.0-preview.1.1...v4.150.0-preview.2.1)

## Preview 1 (June 13, 2026)

Preview 1 cut the line on the Skia m150 bump.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.148.0...v4.150.0-preview.1.1)
